What We Do

Full-service lawn & landscape care

From a weekly mow to a complete landscape redesign, we handle every detail with skill and care.

Mowing & Trimming

Regular mowing, edging, and trimming to keep your property looking clean and revitalized week after week.

Landscaping

Personalized consulting and professional design for new projects or property updates — from native plantings to full installations.

Hardscaping

Patios, sidewalks, driveways, rock gardens, and ponds that improve the appearance, value, and function of your landscape.

Aeration, Seeding & Mulch

Hydroseeding, mulch seeding, and aeration to keep your lawn thriving through every season.

Irrigation

Custom irrigation systems designed, installed, and maintained for a healthy, lush lawn. Seasonal turn-on and winterization available.

Clean-Ups

Seasonal clean-up services to keep your property tidy and prepared all year long.

Our Commitment

Lawn care with care

🌎

Sustainability

From native plants to the right fertilizers, sustainable design and maintenance is our goal on every project.

🤝

Customer Care

From the first call to the finished job, we cater to your needs and work hard to exceed your expectations.

💰

Affordability

We help you stay within budget without sacrificing quality — finding cost-effective solutions that really work.

1986 Est.

About Us

Brian Driskell & Mill Lawn Service

Brian Driskell has been providing professional lawn care and landscape design across the Overland Park area since 1986. What started as a commitment to quality work at fair prices has grown into nearly four decades of trusted service for homeowners and businesses alike.

Whether it's a routine mow or a full landscape redesign, Brian brings the same attention to detail and personal service to every job — on time and within budget.

Licensed & insured professional
Commercial & residential clients
Free on-site consultations
Competitive, transparent pricing
Service Areas Overland Park · Blue Springs · Leawood · Lees Summit · Lenexa · Mission · Mission Hills · Olathe · Prairie Village · Roeland Park · Shawnee · Stilwell
